name: postmessage-safe-api
description: AtlasdrawAPI surface is postMessage-safe from v1: all methods async, all return values JSON-serializable (no DOM nodes, no class instances). structuredClone(LngLat) silently strips methods — does NOT throw. Structural test: every public method passes structured-clone round-trip on args and return value.

title: AIStyleClient targets OpenAI Chat Completions shape for BYOK/Ollama compatibility
rationale: OpenAI Chat Completions shape is the de-facto API standard. Same client works with Ollama (local) and any OpenAI-compatible endpoint. No vendor lock-in at the API call layer. BYOK = bring your own key.
